title: Destructible sealing disk and methods associated therewith
abstract: A drill piping or tubing pressure seal includes a diameter-spanning body portion. The diameter-spanning body portion includes a high-pressure side, a low-pressure side and a plug receptacle passing through the diameter-spanning body portion from the high-pressure side to the low-pressure side. The high-pressure side and the low-pressure side of the diameter-spanning body portion include a protective coating; however, an interior surface of the plug receptacle located between the high-pressure side and the low-pressure side does not include the protective coating. In addition, a plug is configured to be located within the plug receptacle, and the plug is configured to be retained within the plug receptacle by an anchor element to maintain the plug within the plug receptacle until a breakaway force of the anchor element is exceeded. A gasket is located between a portion of the plug and the plug receptacle.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A drill piping or tubing pressure seal, comprising: a diameter-spanning body portion connected to a circumferential rim portion, the diameter-spanning body portion including a high-pressure side, a low-pressure side and a plug receptacle passing through the diameter-spanning body portion from the high-pressure side to the low-pressure side, wherein the high-pressure side and the low-pressure side of the diameter-spanning body portion include a protective coating, and wherein an interior surface of the plug receptacle located between the high-pressure side and the low-pressure side does not include the protective coating; a plug configured to be located within the plug receptacle, the plug configured to be retained within the plug receptacle by an anchor element to maintain the plug within the plug receptacle until a breakaway force of the anchor element is exceeded; and a gasket located between a portion of the plug and the plug receptacle. 2 The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the diameter- spanning body portion and the circumferential rim portion are a single monolithic piece. 3. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the diameter- spanning body portion and the circumferential rim portion are integrally formed. 4. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the diameter- spanning body portion and the circumferential rim portion are made of a corrodible material configured to structurally degrade when the plug receptacle is exposed to oil and gas well fluids and/or an acid. 5. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the protective coating comprises phenolic epoxy. 6. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the anchor element includes frangible threads on the plug configured for threadably mating with mating threads on the plug receptacle. 7. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the anchor element includes a frangible pin configured to contact a portion of the plug. 8. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 7, wherein the frangible pin is configured to extend through an anchor port of the plug. 9. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 8, wherein the frangible pin is configured to contact the low-pressure side of the diameter-spanning body portion when the breakaway force is applied to the anchor element. 10. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the diameter- spanning body portion is domed-shaped, and wherein the high-pressure side is a convex surface and the low-pressure side is a concave surface. 11. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the diameter- spanning body portion is not dome-shaped. 12. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the high-pressure side of the diameter-spanning portion is flat or substantially flat. 13. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the low-pressure side of the diameter-spanning portion is flat or substantially flat. 14. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the gasket comprises an elastomeric material. 15. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the gasket comprises an adhesive. 16. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein the gasket comprises an O-ring. 17. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein at least a portion of the plug receptacle comprises a transversely oriented circular-shaped cross section. 18. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 1, wherein at least a portion of the plug receptacle comprises a transversely oriented polygon-shaped cross section. 19. A drill piping or tubing pressure seal, comprising: a diameter-spanning body portion including a high-pressure side, a low-pressure side and a plug receptacle passing through the diameter-spanning body portion from the high-pressure side to the low-pressure side, wherein the high-pressure side and the low-pressure side of the diameter-spanning body portion include a protective coating, and wherein an interior surface of the plug receptacle located between the high-pressure side and the low-pressure side does not include the protective coating; a plug configured to be located within the plug receptacle, the plug configured to be retained within the plug receptacle by an anchor element to maintain the plug within the plug receptacle until a breakaway force of the anchor element is exceeded; and a gasket located between a portion of the plug and the plug receptacle. 20. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 19, wherein the high-pressure side of the diameter-spanning portion is flat or substantially flat. 21. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 19, wherein the low-pressure side of the diameter-spanning portion is flat or substantially flat. 22. The drill piping or tubing pressure seal according to claim 19, wherein the gasket comprises an elastomeric material.
